Sql:
SELECT A.DENPYONO,
A.DENPYOKBN,
C.KUBUNNM,
A.TENPOCD,
D.TENPOKJ,
A.BNRUICD,
E.CHUBRIKJ,
A.SHIIRECD,
F.SHIIREKJ,
A.HACHUCD,
H.HACHUKJ,
A.HACHUYMD,
A.NOHINYMD,
A.TAXRATECD,
A.TAXRATE,
B.LINENO,
G.MAKERKJ,
B.SHOHINCD,
DECODE(B.BNRUIKBN,'0',(SELECT K.SHOHINKJ || ' ' || K.KIKAKUKJ FROM MS_SHOHIN K WHERE B.SHOHINCD=K.SHOHINCD(+)),
'2',B.JCASHNNM,
'1',(SELECT L.CHUBRIKJ FROM MS_CHUBUNRUI L WHERE B.SHOHINCD=L.CHUBRICD(+))) SHOHINKJ,
B.SURYO,
B.MINHACHUSRY,
B.HACHULOTSU,
B.HACHUSRY,
B.UNITCOST,
B.COSTPRICE,
B.UNITSELL,
B.SELLPRICE,
A.AMOUNTCOST,
A.AMOUNTSELL,
DECODE(A.SHIMEKBN,'1','締','　') SHIME 
FROM TR_SHIIRE_DPH A,
TR_SHIIRE_DPM B,
MS_KUBUN C,
MS_TENPO D,
MS_CHUBUNRUI E,
MS_SHIIRESAKI F,
MS_HACHUSAKI H,
MS_MAKER G,
MS_KIHONINFO I,
MS_SHOHIN J 
WHERE A.DENPYOID=B.DENPYOID 
AND A.CANCELKBN='0' 
AND C.KUBUNTYPE='01' 
AND A.DENPYOKBN=C.KUBUNCD(+) 
AND A.TENPOCD=D.TENPOCD(+) 
AND A.BNRUICD=E.CHUBRICD(+) 
AND A.SHIIRECD=F.SHIIRECD(+) 
AND A.HACHUCD=H.HACHUCD(+) 
AND B.MAKERCD=G.MAKERCD(+) 
AND B.SHOHINCD=J.SHOHINCD(+) 
AND A.TEISEIKBN='0' 
AND B.TEISEIKBN='0' 
AND A.DENPYOKBN NOT BETWEEN '21' AND '23' 
AND A.TENPOCD BETWEEN :TENPO1 AND :TENPO2
AND A.HACHUYMD BETWEEN :STARTDATE AND :ENDDATE
AND A.SHIIRECD BETWEEN :SHIIRECD1 AND :SHIIRECD2
ORDER BY A.TENPOCD,A.NOHINYMD,A.DENPYONO, B.LINENO
